query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN period_no IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as period_null,
  SUM(CASE WHEN period_no IS NULL THEN CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) as amount_period_null,
  SUM(CASE WHEN period_no IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as period_not_null,
  SUM(CASE WHEN period_no IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) as amount_period_not_null
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365';

  SUM(CASE WHEN period_no IS NULL THEN CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) as amount_period_null,
  SUM(CASE WHEN period_no IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as period_not_null,
  SUM(CASE WHEN period_no IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) as amount_period_not_null
